biography:
Hot pot & Chinese comfort food 🍲
Lamb spine • Dry Stir-fried Hot Pot
Plus Southeast Asian dishes & house milk tea
@yoyopandapgh (Allison Park)

tiktok_mentions.query: yotea and yoka kitchen 友茶and友家厨房 pittsburgh

top_videos.text: Yotea & Yoka Kitchen located in Pittsburgh 🔥 This spot is open late daily and I’m so glad I stumbled across their restaurant… they have amazing drinks and their food is so fresh and filling… make sure you also don’t skip out on dessert ‼️
top_videos.author: lilbigbackz

top_videos.text:
Authentic Chinese home-style cooking at YOYO Panda

North Hills friends, this gem in Allison Park is a must try! YOYO Panda is from the same owners of Yotea & Yoka Kitchen in Oakland. The unassuming location is a delight inside with elevate
top_videos.author: foodnerdnelli

top_videos.text:
Yotea & Yoka Kitchen 友茶 & 友家厨房—one of the fastest-growing spots right now.

Their boba is fresh, creamy, and premium… one sip and you’ll want more.

And the food? Authentic Chinese, straight from the wok—hot, flavorful, and satisfying.

One
top_videos.author: mr.raden_lombok_ntb
